meta.title: Japalingo — Learn to read Japanese, the fun way
meta.description: Master every hiragana & katakana with playful mnemonics, mini-games, and spaced repetition. Free, no account needed, and a shiba named Hoshi cheering you on.

hero.subtitle: Playful, scientifically-backed lessons for every hiragana & katakana — built on mnemonics, mini-games, and spaced repetition. With a shiba named Hoshi who believes in you.
hero.trust: No sign-up · Works offline · Just fun

how.title: Three tiny steps to reading Japanese
how.subtitle: No grammar drills, no overwhelm. Meet a character, play until it sticks, keep your streak alive.

steps.title: Meet a kana
steps.body: A quick story + memory hint links each character's shape to its sound. し looks like a shepherd's crook — “shee.”

steps.title: Play until it sticks
steps.body: Drill it, match it, type it, hear it, race it. Ten game modes hit the same kana from every angle.

steps.title: Keep your streak
steps.body: Spaced repetition brings each kana back right before you'd forget. Earn XP, crowns, and Hoshi's applause.

features.title: Built to make kana actually stick
features.subtitle: Every choice serves one goal: you, reading Japanese, and enjoying it enough to come back tomorrow.

items.title: Mnemonics that stick
items.body: Learn every character through a vivid memory hint, not brute-force repetition.

items.title: Spaced repetition
items.body: A smart scheduler reviews each kana right before you'd forget it — so you don't.

items.title: Ten ways to play
items.body: Story, drill, match, type, listen, trace, and arcade modes keep practice fresh.

items.title: Hoshi's got you
items.body: Your shiba companion celebrates every win and keeps the motivation high.

games.title: Learning that feels like playing
games.subtitle: The same hiragana & katakana, met through many mini-games — so it never gets boring.

items.name: Kana Rain
items.desc: Type the reading before the kana petals hit the ground. Fast, juicy, addictive.

items.name: Kana Match
items.desc: Flip and pair each character with its sound in a cute concentration grid.

items.name: Quick Match
items.desc: See a kana, tap the right reading. Simple, snappy, endlessly replayable.

items.name: Romaji Rush
items.desc: Type the romaji as fast as you can and grow a blazing combo.

items.name: Ear Training
items.desc: Hear the sound, pick the character. Wire ear to eye.

items.name: Word Builder
items.desc: Use what you've learned to read real Japanese words. あお = blue!

games.more: …and more on the way — Kana Drill, Stroke Master, Kana Sprint.

reading.title: You'll be reading Japanese by lunch
reading.subtitle: These aren't flashcards — they're real words, spelled in kana you'll actually know. Tap to reveal.
reading.footnote: Words & mnemonics are drawn from the Tofugu Learn Hiragana & Katakana books.

finalCta.title: Ready to read Japanese?
finalCta.subtitle: Start with あ. Hoshi will take it from there.
finalCta.trust: Free forever · No account · Works offline

footer.tagline: Learn to read Japanese — the fun way.
footer.credits: Learning content adapted from Tofugu's free Learn Hiragana & Learn Katakana books.
footer.rights: © 2026 Japalingo. A playful way to read Japanese.

soon.title: Hoshi is still in training!
soon.body: The full learning platform — lessons, mini-games, streaks, crowns, and your very first kana — lands in Phase 2. Thanks for previewing Japalingo!
